title: Nighttime Imagery (Day/Night Band, ENCC, VIIRS Suomi NPP)
statusWarning: FROZEN — DefaultDate in WMTS caps is 2023-07-07. No updates since. Queries with any 2024+ date return HTTP 400.
recommendedReplacement: VIIRS_SNPP_DayNightBand (1km, daily, default=2026-04-17) or VIIRS_NOAA20_DayNightBand (1km, daily)
notes: The identifier VIIRS_SNPP_DayNightBand_ENCC is still present in the WMTS capabilities but is a frozen archive product. The ENCC (Enhanced Near Constant Contrast) processing chain was discontinued ~2023-07. For a live daily night-lights layer use VIIRS_SNPP_DayNightBand (tms=1km, format=image/png) which shows default=2026-04-17.
